_comment: Canonical USD per 1M tokens, kept in sync with TauCetiReview runner/review.py PRICES. input/output = list price (Anthropic: platform.claude.com; OpenRouter-routed incl. gpt-5.5: openrouter.ai). cache_read = price for cached/prompt-cache input tokens (Anthropic ~0.1x input; OpenAI gpt-5.5 = $0.50). Used to re-cost ESTIMATED run records (cost_estimated==true, i.e. codex/gpt-5.5) cache-aware. claude costs are the CLI's real total_cost_usd and deepseek/pi costs are provider-reported — both are NOT re-costed.
